imageMessage.caption:
🚨🇯🇵 THIS is why the world respects Japan.

After their heartbreaking FIFA World Cup exit, Japan’s players and head coach Hajime Moriyasu didn’t make excuses.

Instead, they bowed before their fans, apologized for the result, and thanked them for standing by the team until the very end. ❤️👏

Win with class. Lose with even greater class. 🇯🇵⚽
29 Million Gallons of water 🤯
Just friends 😂
Me 😂
Greatest 😂
What do you see? 🤔
So true 😂
🦟 It sounds crazy... but these mosquitoes are actually saving Hawaii's rarest birds. 🐦❤️
Success means even more when you never forget the people who helped you reach it. ❤️
Wow! 😍
Sometimes, the greatest victory isn't winning a crown—it's refusing to let others define your worth. 👑❤️
92 years! 🤯
He still lives in a 400 sq ft room! 🤯
Facts 😂
Boys will be boys 😂
That's me 😂

🦜🏠 A missing parrot in Japan found his way home in the most incredible way.

After flying away, Yosuke stayed silent with police but later told a veterinarian his full name and home address, allowing authorities to reunite him with his family. 📍💚

His owners had spent two years teaching him the information—proving that the training paid off in the most unexpected way. 🧠✨
Mistake happens 🥹

extendedTextMessage.text:
Ma'am, I've spoken with students of other branches, and their HODs said that we shall not be allowed to take up the new courses. Can you please confirm that?
and if that is the case, how and when can we take up the course?

quotedMessage.conversation: Course equivalence option will be made available for you. In that case, please note that you have to register for both theory and lab (embedded) even if you have cleared any one of the component already

message.conversation: S ma. Course equivalence option is not provided this time.
If there is any update, I will let you know

extendedTextMessage.text:
Ma'am, I've spoken with students of other branches, and their HODs said that we shall not be allowed to take up the new courses. Can you please confirm that?
and if that is the case, how and when can we take up the course?

quotedMessage.conversation: Course equivalence option will be made available for you. In that case, please note that you have to register for both theory and lab (embedded) even if you have cleared any one of the component already

pollCreationMessageV3.name: What side dish do you search for most often?

options.optionName: Side dish for idly and dosa

message.conversation:
Nepali Chukauni 🥔🥣✨
A refreshing and flavorful Nepali potato salad made with yogurt, spices, and herbs—creamy, tangy, and perfect as a side dish or light meal. Happy Cooking 😊💕

Thuvaiyal Omelette 🥚🌿✨
A delicious twist on the classic omelette, made with flavorful South Indian thuvaiyal—spicy, aromatic, and perfect for breakfast or a quick meal. Happy Cooking 😊💕

extendedTextMessage.text:
My visit to Seychelles has been filled with substantive outcomes that will boost the India-Seychelles friendship. I can confidently say that while the past fifty years of our relationship have been marked by deep trust and shared progress, the next fifty years will be defined by innovation, sustainability and shared prosperity.

I am happy to have joined the National Day celebrations and that too during the time when Seychelles marks 50 years of Independence. I thank President Herminie, the Government and people of Seychelles for their affection.

https://youtu.be/urdw2FFr38k
extendedTextMessage.description: PM Modi's landmark State Visit to Seychelles further strengthened t...
extendedTextMessage.title: PM Modi’s Seychelles visit in a nutshell: from grand welcomes to successful assembly address! 🇮🇳 🇸🇨

videoMessage.caption: Hot day in Chennai. Looking at the skies it appears localised development through sea Breeze looks less likely. But satellite image indicates good moisture push from the West so possibly we may see storms develop later in the evening moving in from interiors.

imageMessage.caption: Parts of South Delta may see some moderate rains from the storms that gave rains earlier over Pudukottai district. Like yesterday parts of Villupuram and Cuddalore may see light / moderate rains from the storms currently seen over Salem dt as it moves closer to the coast. As of now except for some isolated storms around Bengaluru nothing much seen closer to Chennai latitude. Need to see if something develops later in the evening

videoMessage.caption: Light rains are reported at many places around Chennai. These are not Thunderstorms but rains from moisture pushed by monsoon from the West. Drizzle could continue for about 15 / 20 minutes
